title: ambrosia dentata
intro: Ambrosia dentata, also known as the Flowering Ragweed or Bristly Bur Sage, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Ambrosia dentata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
